text: Carbon dots (CDs) have been extensively studied in the field of materials science in recent years. However, there is only limited understanding of the mechanism of their formation. Herein, we reported the fabrication of CDs via the one-step hydrothermal treatment of 4-aminoantipyrine. Moreover, through optimizing reaction time, the evolvement process of the as-obtained material was elucidated thoroughly and depicted into a schematic model for polymerization and carbonization process during the evolution of CDs.
